name: Check `n Go
description_short: Edmond, OK's Check 'n Go at 360 S N Kelley Ave offers quick payday and title loans with same-day approval.
description_long:
Check 'n Go's Edmond, OK location at 360 S N Kelley Ave is conveniently situated for residents and visitors seeking quick financial solutions. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 2 PM, with extended hours designed for working professionals in the Edmond area. This standalone location puts payday and title loans within reach when you need them most.

At the Edmond Check 'n Go, you can access payday loans, title loans, and other short-term financial products designed for immediate cash needs. The staff at 405-216-0052 can walk you through application requirements and help you understand your options within minutes. Whether you need funds for an emergency car repair or unexpected medical expense, this Edmond location specializes in fast approvals.

As an Edmond resident or commuter, this Check 'n Go location at 360 S N Kelley Ave is designed for quick in-and-out transactions. Bring a valid ID, recent pay stubs, and proof of a bank account to speed up the application process. Check 'n Go has served thousands of borrowers across Oklahoma with transparent terms and competitive rates.
address: 360 S N Kelley Ave, Edmond, OK 73003

company_info.headquarters: 360 S N Kelley Ave, Edmond, OK 73003

pros: Same-day funding available for in-store applications; next-business-day for online
5.0-star Google rating with 1,024 reviews citing excellent customer service and staff by name
No-cost extended payment plans available (reduces immediate repayment pressure)
Accepts Matricula Consular card in addition to standard ID (serves immigrant populations)
Quick application process (applicants report approval in minutes)
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, and phone
Open 6 days per week with extended hours (10am-6pm Mon-Fri, 10am-2pm Sat)
cons: No APR or fee transparency on website; payday loans typically 400%+ APR when annualized
Website currently down for 'system maintenance' during data collection, indicating operational issues
Requires active checking account for 30+ days (excludes unbanked consumers from core product)
Credit score impact unclear; company explicitly states inability to advise on credit effects
No mention of alternative products for consumers seeking to avoid high-cost debt cycles
best_for: Consumers with stable employment needing small cash ($100-$1,000) before next paycheck
Unbanked or underbanked individuals with active checking accounts seeking fast funding
Borrowers in urgent situations (medical bills, utility shutoff, emergency repairs) willing to accept high APR
Immigrants with Matricula Consular identification who lack traditional banking relationships
diagnosis: Check 'n Go is best for employed consumers facing genuine emergencies who need cash within hours and have access to an active checking account, despite the high cost of payday loans. The primary caveat is that payday loans carry steep APRs (typically 400%+ annualized) and are designed only as short-term bridges to the next paycheck; repeated use creates debt spirals that harm financial stability.
services: Payday loans (short-term loans due at next payday)
In-store loan applications and same-day funding
Online loan applications with next-business-day funding
meta_description: Check 'n Go at 360 S N Kelley Ave, Edmond, OK. Fast payday and title loans with same-day approval.
